 32→public class MultiLineIfElseRule :
 33→    StandardRule(
 34→        id = "multiline-if-else",
 35→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 36→            setOf(
 37→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 38→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 39→            ),
 40→    ) {
 41→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 42→
 43→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 44→        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
 45→            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 46→            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 47→        )
 48→    }
 49→
 50→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 51→        node: ASTNode,
 52→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 53→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 54→    ) {
 55→        if (node.elementType == THEN || node.elementType == ELSE) {
 56→            if (node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BLOCK) {
 57→                return
 58→            }
 59→
 60→            if (!node.treePrev.textContains('\n')) {
 61→                if (node.firstChildNode.elementType == IF) {
 62→                    // Allow single line for:
 63→                    // else if (...)
 64→                    return
 65→                }
 66→                if (!node.treeParent.textContains('\n')) {
 67→                    // Allow single line if statements as long as they are really simple (e.g. do not contain newlines)
 68→                    //    if (...) <statement> // no else statement
 69→                    //    if (...) <statement> else <statement>
 70→                    return
 71→                }
 72→            }
 73→
 74→            emit(node.firstChildNode.startOffset, "Missing { ... }", true)
 75→            if (autoCorrect) {
 76→                autocorrect(node)

 78→        }
 79→    }

 85→                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
 86→                .toList()
 87→                .reversed()

 91→                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
 92→                .toList()
 93→                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
 94→
 95→        prevLeaves
 96→            .firstOrNull()
 97→            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
 98→            ?.let {
 99→                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
100→            }
101→        KtBlockExpression(null).apply {
102→            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
103→            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
104→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
105→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent().plus(indentConfig.indent)))
106→            prevLeaves
107→                .dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
108→                .forEach(::addChild)
109→            addChild(previousChild)
110→            nextLeaves.forEach(::addChild)
111→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent()))
112→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(RBRACE, "}"))
113→        }
114→
115→        // Make sure else starts on same line as newly inserted right brace
116→        if (node.elementType == THEN) {
117→            node
118→                .nextSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
119→                ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
120→        }
121→    }
122→}

Looking at the rule logic:
1. On line 61-64, it checks if `node.firstChildNode.elementType == IF` to allow single-line "else if"
2. But this check only happens when `!node.treePrev.textContains('\n')` (line 60)

The issue is that when the code is multiline, the condition on line 60 is false, so it skips the "else if" check and tries to enforce the block.

The root cause is that the check for "else if" is only done for single-line code. For multiline code with `else if`, we need to also check if the `IF` inside the `ELSE` has proper blocks.

Now I understand the issue. The check on line 61-64 only applies when there's no newline before the node. But for multiline code with proper blocks, we should also allow the "else if" pattern.

The fix is to check if the first child of ELSE is an IF and whether that IF already has proper formatting. Let me analyze the logic more carefully:

Looking at line 60-64:
- Line 60: `if (!node.treePrev.textContains('\n'))` - this checks if there's no newline BEFORE the node
- Line 61-64: `if (node.firstChildNode.elementType == IF)` - this allows "else if" for single-line code

The issue is that for multiline code, `node.treePrev.textContains('\n')` returns true (there IS a newline), so the condition `!node.treePrev.textContains('\n')` is false, and we skip the check for "else if".

The fix should be: we should check if the first child is an IF and whether that IF properly has braces in its branches, regardless of whether there are newlines.

 29→/**
 30→ * https://kotlinlang.org/docs/reference/coding-conventions.html#formatting-control-flow-statements
 31→ */
 32→public class MultiLineIfElseRule :
 33→    StandardRule(
 34→        id = "multiline-if-else",
 35→        usesEditorConfigProperties =
 36→            setOf(
 37→                INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY,
 38→                INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY,
 39→            ),
 40→    ) {
 41→    private var indentConfig = IndentConfig.DEFAULT_INDENT_CONFIG
 42→
 43→    override fun beforeFirstNode(editorConfig: EditorConfig) {
 44→        indentConfig = IndentConfig(
 45→            indentStyle = editorConfig[INDENT_STYLE_PROPERTY],
 46→            tabWidth = editorConfig[INDENT_SIZE_PROPERTY],
 47→        )
 48→    }
 49→
 50→    override fun beforeVisitChildNodes(
 51→        node: ASTNode,
 52→        autoCorrect: Boolean,
 53→        emit: (offset: Int, errorMessage: String, canBeAutoCorrected: Boolean) -> Unit,
 54→    ) {
 55→        if (node.elementType == THEN || node.elementType == ELSE) {
 56→            if (node.firstChildNode?.elementType == BLOCK) {
 57→                return
 58→            }
 59→
 60→            if (!node.treePrev.textContains('\n')) {
 61→                if (node.firstChildNode.elementType == IF) {
 62→                    // Allow single line for:
 63→                    // else if (...)
 64→                    return
 65→                }
 66→                if (!node.treeParent.textContains('\n')) {
 67→                    // Allow single line if statements as long as they are really simple (e.g. do not contain newlines)
 68→                    //    if (...) <statement> // no else statement
 69→                    //    if (...) <statement> else <statement>
 70→                    return
 71→                }
 72→            }
 73→
 74→            emit(node.firstChildNode.startOffset, "Missing { ... }", true)
 75→            if (autoCorrect) {
 76→                autocorrect(node)
 77→            }
 78→        }
 79→    }
 80→
 81→    private fun autocorrect(node: ASTNode) {
 82→        val prevLeaves =
 83→            node
 84→                .leaves(forward = false)
 85→                .takeWhile { it.elementType !in listOf(RPAR, ELSE_KEYWORD) }
 86→                .toList()
 87→                .reversed()
 88→        val nextLeaves =
 89→            node
 90→                .leaves(forward = true)
 91→                .takeWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() || it.isPartOfComment() }
 92→                .toList()
 93→                .dropLastWhile { it.isWhiteSpaceWithoutNewline() }
 94→
 95→        prevLeaves
 96→            .firstOrNull()
 97→            .takeIf { it.isWhiteSpace() }
 98→            ?.let {
 99→                (it as LeafPsiElement).rawReplaceWithText(" ")
100→            }
101→        KtBlockExpression(null).apply {
102→            val previousChild = node.firstChildNode
103→            node.replaceChild(node.firstChildNode, this)
104→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(LBRACE, "{"))
105→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent().plus(indentConfig.indent)))
106→            prevLeaves
107→                .dropWhile { it.isWhiteSpace() }
108→                .forEach(::addChild)
109→            addChild(previousChild)
110→            nextLeaves.forEach(::addChild)
111→            addChild(PsiWhiteSpaceImpl(node.indent()))
112→            addChild(LeafPsiElement(RBRACE, "}"))
113→        }
114→
115→        // Make sure else starts on same line as newly inserted right brace
116→        if (node.elementType == THEN) {
117→            node
118→                .nextSibling { !it.isPartOfComment() }
119→                ?.upsertWhitespaceBeforeMe(" ")
120→        }
121→    }
122→}
